description:
Vice presidential nominees Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and Ohio Senator JD Vance took the stage in New York City Tuesday night for their first and only debate. (CBS News, C-SPAN)

Read more HERE: https://bit.ly/4dqd9el 

CHAPTERS:
----------------------------
00:00 Censorship
01:27 Vance's remarks on Trump
02:11 Walz's travel discrepancies 
02:58 Immigration 
06:29 Abortion
07:46 Gun violence 
08:40 Economy
